Added.entry: Dominium Q49 preflight evidence and Q50 dry-run readiness guidance.
Added.follow_up:
- Run Q50 Dominium Fresh Install / Upgrade from Stable Pack as observe/compare/plan/dry-run only.
- Preserve target AIDE memory, queue, golden tasks, doctrine refs, generated evidence, and XStack/AuditX/RepoX/TestX systems.

AIDE-Task: DOMINIUM-AIDE-FRESH-PREFLIGHT-01
AIDE-Phase: Q49
AIDE-Result: READY_FOR_Q50_WITH_WARNINGS
AIDE-Scope: .aide preflight evidence
AIDE-Token-Impact: compact evidence only
AIDE-Quality-Gate: PASS_WITH_WARNINGS
Added.risks:
- Target AIDE remains older than Q36-Q48 command families and requires an upgrade dry-run rather than direct apply.
- The source bundle is local preview/no-publish with apply mode unavailable.
- Existing Dominium gate systems need separate explicit validation scope before execution.
Added.subject: aide(dominium): preflight stable AIDE install readiness
Added.summary: Dominium Q49 preflight evidence and Q50 dry-run readiness guidance.
Added.validation:
- PASS: `git diff --cached --check`.
- PASS: AIDE `doctor`, `test`, `selftest`, `eval run`, `commit check --latest`, `git policy`, Q50 `pack` generation, generated JSON parse checks, `.aide.local` ignore check, and release bundle checksum/listing checks.
- WARN: AIDE `validate` and `verify` retain review-packet/reference/diff-scope warnings; changelog preview reports malformed historical commits.
- NOT RUN: Dominium XStack/TestX/AuditX/RepoX/CMake validators, because Q49 is evidence-only and those systems can write audit/cache/build outputs.
